## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issues
Closes #

## Type Of Change
- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Validation
- [ ] client lint (`npm run lint` in client)
- [ ] client build (`npm run build` in client)
- [ ] server lint (`npm run lint` in server)
- [ ] tests (if relevant)

## Screenshots (if UI changed)
Before/after images or recordings.

## Checklist
- [ ] I followed the contribution guidelines.
- [ ] I updated docs where needed.
- [ ] I added/updated tests where needed.
- [ ] I checked for breaking changes.
